framework: next.js pages router, static export (output: export, trailingSlash: true)

hero_landing.hero_page: app/pages/index.tsx (HomePage, route /) — unconditional hero; identity not consulted

copy_keys.points: home.subheadingPoints (string[]) = no email / no login-or-password / no phone / no messages from strangers / completely free
copy_keys.title: home.title = 'Welcome to few.chat'

hero_landing.note: No create-identity CTA; four nav tiles (contacts/groups/profile/info) are the CTAs. Reuse home.subheadingLead + home.subheadingPoints for the welcome pitch.

identity.context: app/src/context/NostrIdentityContext.tsx:174-187 — init() calls loadStoredIdentity(); if null, auto-generates keypair from 128-bit seed and saves. This null-at-init result is the 'first-time visitor' signal to surface as isFreshIdentity.
identity.hydrated_flag: context exposes hydrated; useNostrIdentity() gives { hydrated, pubkeyHex, privateKeyHex, ... }
identity.provider_order: AppTheme > Chakra > Language > Profile > NostrIdentity > Marmot > Layout (NostrIdentity + Marmot are dynamic ssr:false)

profile.context: app/src/context/ProfileContext.tsx — saveProfile({...profile, nickname}) persists locally (lp_userProfile_v1); heals default avatar. NEVER broadcast (kind-0) per privacy invariant.

contact_card.route: app/pages/add.tsx — handles /add#c=<base64url> (card in URL fragment, never query, static-export privacy)
contact_card.pure_core: app/src/lib/addDeepLink.ts (readLocationHash -> resolveAddDeepLink -> processContactInput). Currently returns { state: 'awaiting_identity' } while not hydrated and shows spinner copy.add.settingUp (testid add-page-setting-up).
contact_card.decode: app/src/lib/contactCard.ts parseContactCard(payload) -> profile.nickname; PURE, verifies signature, no local identity needed. v1 (version 00) + v2 pairing (version 01, signed, has expiry+16B nonce). HAS_AVATAR bit reserved 0 (no avatar).
contact_card.no_name_cases: v1 without name / bare npub / nostr: URI carry no name -> unknown-inviter fallback (omit invite line).
contact_card.pairing_echo: v2 nameless scanner: attemptOrQueuePairingEcho (app/src/lib/pendingIntent.ts) defers echo, currently redirects to /profile?pairing=1&issuer=<pubkey> for name setup. Welcome-screen name capture can satisfy this inline; echo mechanism unchanged.

group_invite.route: app/pages/groups.tsx:541-560 — GroupsPage reads ?join=<nonce>&admin=<npub>&name=<groupName>; if all present renders <JoinRequestCard> (short-circuits before ?id detail and list/hero).
group_invite.join_card: app/src/components/groups/JoinRequestCard.tsx — name gate: gateActive = isNameGateActive(profile.nickname); shows name Input (testid join-request-name-input) required; requestDisabled = gateActive && !hasShareableName(draftName); handleSendRequest saves name via saveProfile then sendJoinRequest(requesterName). Success -> testid join-request-sent.
group_invite.group_name_source: from URL name param (cleartext), rendered as copy.groups.joinRequestHeading with {groupName}. No relay/crypto read pre-request.
group_invite.send_path: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestSender.ts sendJoinRequest — name travels in NIP-59 gift-wrapped request, never kind-0.

i18n.file: app/src/lib/i18n.ts — type Copy (nested) + const copy: Record<LanguageCode, Copy> with en + de; any new key must be in Copy type AND both dictionaries.
i18n.usage: components: const copy = useCopy() from @/src/context/LanguageContext; dynamic strings use function copy e.g. (name) => string.
i18n.long_form_exception: info/imprint pages use markdown, not i18n — not relevant here (welcome screen is short UI strings).

testing.unit: vitest, tests/unit/**/*.test.ts only; no jsdom/@testing-library; hooks tested via exported pure-function extraction; reuse app/src/themes/contrast.ts for contrast; decorative components carry no i18n by precedent.
testing.e2e: playwright app/tests/e2e/. Non-relay bucket (12 tests) on next dev; groups/relay bucket (48) needs docker. Full gate: make test-e2e-all. e2e must publish through the app, never raw WebSocket. Relevant existing specs: dm-pairing-*, groups-* , add/contacts flows.
testing.make: always go through make (platform stamp). make test = unit + e2e-all.
